title: Betheaces NO.321 Bubble Machine with 2 Bottles of Liquid, Automatic Bubble Maker Toys for Kids Boys Girls Baby Toddlers, Bubble Blower 500 Bubbles per Minute Gifts for Indoor Outdoor Garden Game
features: 2018 NEW DESIGN OF FROG SHAPE - Fun, bright frog shape will delight kids of all ages as they watch loads of exciting bubbles pour out of its mouth in a continuous stream It can produce more than 500 colorful bubble madness per minute. Create whirlpools of fun no matter how big the party.

CHILD-FRIENDLY & EASY TO USE - Made with Non-Toxic ABS plastic. safe, durable and colorful Easy to pour bubble mixture in the front - any kid can do it, then switch on and play. Needs 4 x AA batteries (NOT INCLUDED).
GREAT FOR INDOOR & OUTDOOR - Portable size: 12 x 12cm & Lightweight: 170.5g. So you or your kids can take it to anywhere and use it whenever yours want.

PARTIES MAGIC ENTERTAINER & A MUST HAVE GIFT - Fit for Christmas, birthday parties, weddings, kindergartens, playgrounds, pet parks, pool gatherings, picnics, etc. Also a good choice for kids Birthday or Christmas gift.

EASY TO CLEAN & STORE - Only need to use wet cloth or tissues to wipe the machine. Mini size that save the space and you can store it so easy. We have 2 different packaging boxes. The packaging box is shipped randomly. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us, we will try our best to help you.
description: Product Description Betheaces Bubble Machine - A professional, portable Bubble Blower that allows you to create bubble-fantastic fun for any event. A delight with the kids as it creates a fun and energetic atmosphere. As a children's entertainer, this is a must have item. Easy to operate and it can provide a lot of bubbles, children will love it and enjoy the bubbles blow in the air. It is good for indoor and outdoor activities. Mini size with lightweight, it can run long time. Not only kids but also adults are will have a lot fun with it A practical gadgets - It's wonderful to make interesting effects or decorate parties, barbecue or some special events, etc. Possible perfect for summer garden day or summer outdoor activities. Product Brand name: Betheaces. How to use: 1. Install the batteries, put on the battery cover and install the screw (NOTE: 4 X AA batteries are Not Included) 2. Pour the bubble solution into the machine 3. Press the on-off button 4. Start to work Please Enjoy the fun Package include: 1 x Frog Bubble Maker 2 x Bubble Solution 1 x Mini Screwdriver 1 x User Manual Please note: 1. The number of bubbles depends on the quality of the solution. 2. Please don’t drink the bubble solution. Clean your hands before eating after using the machine. 3. Children under 3 years please use with adults’ supervision. 4. Wind directions may affect the normal use of the machine, and please use downwind in outdoor play. 5. Due to the small and portable design, the air duct of the device is compact, so it sounds a little noisy in a very quiet place when it runs. 6. Please keep the air intake ports free from blockage; better not to use it outdoors in rainy days in case of a short circuit. Indications Children's entertainment, Party decoration, Outdoor and Indoor play Safety Warning NO See more
